title: Everyone Wants Doflamingo
description: Pages 1–5 focus on everyone wants doflamingo, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Doflamingo Family, Dressrosa Citizens, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as the Colosseum fighters choose to help Luffy, and the rebellion turns into a race to reach Doflamingo before the country is crushed.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: They got his head! Lord Pica has stopped moving!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: BURGEON- ING CHADS! Dressrosa's head over heels!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What the hell is going on!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Here they come again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: AYAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The one who's gonna stop Doflamingo is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: No, it's me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hold them off!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Do not let them reach the Palace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Move it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Kyaa KYAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Kya- What momentum!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Even now, they still stand against the young master...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The group from the colos- seum simply cannot be stopped!

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: They've still got Fujitora's Marines to get through!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They don't stand a chance!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Because I'll

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So the ones who stopped Lord Pica were the straw hats, after all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: This battle is currently divided into...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Four aspects.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Kyros' side

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Please, go quietly, kyros!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: HAA-

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: It's not that we want your bounty!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: If we don't kill you guys, the rest of our deaths are guaranteed! It's just a matter of time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: We must have all 12 of you. convicts give your- selves up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: I can't say I blame you for your decision...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: But it's all the more reason to let me go on ahead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: As I, too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Have things I must accom- plish!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Former Royal Plateau

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: God usopp and his band have made it from the under- ground trading port to the surface.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Viola, King Riku

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: They passed through the colosseum and have arrived upon the Royal Plateau.

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: What!? Luffy-Senpai isn't here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: obviously.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: How exactly is that obvious !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Luffy can't stand still in the same place for more than 5 minutes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Freedom! That's my pirate King for ya!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: What is that stone monster!? King Riku!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: The following

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: And why is the Royal Plateau up there!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Robin! We've got some pursuers climbing up after us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Ahh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: After everyone's climbed up, we'll cut that net!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: pardon me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: WAAA AAAA AAAA!!!

summary: Everyone Wants Doflamingo develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Doflamingo Family, Dressrosa Citizens, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
